effect_entries.effect: Inflige des dégâts réguliers.  Si la cible a déjà agi ce tour, son talent est annulé.
effect_entries.short_effect: Annule le talent de la cible si elle agit plus tôt.

effect_entries.effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has already moved this turn, its ability is nullified.
effect_entries.short_effect: Nullifies the target’s ability if it moves earlier.
